# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.

Prevent cloud compute security.
# Category: cloud_compute_security


{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vmCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 3,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Number of virtual machines to create."
      }
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_D2s_v3",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Size of the virtual machine."
      }
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Admin username on all VMs"
      }
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Admin password for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "publicIPAddressName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('pubip-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Public IP address name for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "publicIPAddressType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Static",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Dynamic",
        "Static"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Public IP address type for all VMs (Dynamic or Static)"
      }
    },
    "publicIPAddressSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "Standard"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Public IP address SKU for all VMs (Basic or Standard)"
      }
    },
    "publicIPAddressAllocationMethod": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Static",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Dynamic",
        "Static"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Public IP address allocation method for all VMs (Dynamic or Static)"
      }
    },
    "publicIPAddressIdleTimeoutInMinutes": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 4,
      "minValue": 4,
      "maxValue": 30,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Public IP address idle timeout in minutes for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityGroupName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('nsg-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security group name for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityRuleName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('nsgr-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security rule name for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityRulePriority": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 100,
      "minValue": 100,
      "maxValue": 4096,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security rule priority for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityRuleProtocol": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Tcp",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Tcp",
        "Udp",
        "Icmp"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security rule protocol for all VMs (TCP, UDP or ICMP)"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityRuleSourcePortRange": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "*",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security rule source port range for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityRuleDestinationPortRange": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "*",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security rule destination port range for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityRuleSourceAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "*",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security rule source address prefix for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityRuleDestinationAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "*",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security rule destination address prefix for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityRuleAccess": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Allow",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Allow",
        "Deny"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security rule access for all VMs (Allow or Deny)"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityRuleDirection": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Inbound",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Inbound",
        "Outbound"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security rule direction for all VMs (Inbound or Outbound)"
      }
    },
    "networkSecurityRuleDescription": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Allow inbound traffic from any source IP address",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Network security rule description for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('vm-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Virtual machine name prefix"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 3,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Number of virtual machines to create"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_D2s_v3",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Size of the virtual machine"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineAdminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Admin username on all VMs"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineAdminPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Admin password for all VMs"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineImagePublisher": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "MicrosoftWindowsServer",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Virtual machine image publisher"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineImageOffer": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "WindowsServer",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Virtual machine image offer"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineImageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2019-Datacenter",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Virtual machine image SKU"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineImageVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "latest",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Virtual machine image version"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('datadisk-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Virtual machine data disk name prefix"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskSizeInGB": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 128,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Size of the virtual machine data disk in GB"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskLun": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 0,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Logical Unit Number (LUN) for the data disk"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskCaching": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "ReadWrite",
      "allowedValues": [
        "None",
        "ReadOnly",
        "ReadWrite"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Caching option for the data disk (None, ReadOnly or ReadWrite)"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskCreateOption": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Empty",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Attach",
        "Empty"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Create option for the data disk (Attach or Empty)"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskStorageAccountType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "Premium_LRS"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Storage account type for the data disk (Standard_LRS or Premium_LRS)"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskKind": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "managed",
      "allowedValues": [
        "managed",
        "unmanaged"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Kind of the data disk (managed or unmanaged)"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskWriteAcceleratorEnabled": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable write accelerator on the data disk"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskDiskIOPSReadWrite": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 500,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Disk IOPS for read and write operations"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskDiskMBpsReadWrite": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 64,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Throughput in MBps for read and write operations"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskMaxShares": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 1,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Maximum number of VMs that can attach to the data disk simultaneously"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskEncryptionSetId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "ID of the encryption set that is used to encrypt the data disk. If provided, the disk will be encrypted using the provided encryption set."
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskBurstingEnabled": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable bursting on the data disk"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskPremiumIORegistration": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "disabled",
      "allowedValues": [
        "enabled",
        "disabled"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable premium I/O registration on the data disk"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskLun1": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 1,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Logical Unit Number (LUN) for the data disk"

      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskWriteAcceleratorEnabled5": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable write accelerator on the data disk"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskDiskIOPSReadWrite5": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 500,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Disk IOPS for read and write operations"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskDiskMBpsReadWrite5": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 64,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Throughput in MBps for read and write operations"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskMaxShares5": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 1,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Maximum number of VMs that can attach to the data disk simultaneously"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskEncryptionSetId5": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "ID of the encryption set that is used to encrypt the data disk. If provided, the disk will be encrypted using the provided encryption set."
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskBurstingEnabled5": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable bursting on the data disk"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskPremiumIORegistration5": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "disabled",
      "allowedValues": [
        "enabled",
        "disabled"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable premium I/O registration on the data disk"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskLun6": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 6,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Logical Unit Number (LUN) for the data disk"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskNamePrefix6": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('datadisk-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Prefix for the name of the data disk"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskSizeInGB6": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 128,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Size of the data disk in GB"
      }
    },
    "virtualMachineDataDiskCaching6": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "ReadWrite",
      "allowedValues": [
        "None",
        "ReadOnly",
        "ReadWrite"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Caching option
